description: Nutrient-powered PDF extraction. Replaces the default pdfjs text extractor with Nutrient's pdf-to-markdown CLI for dramatically better table, heading, and reading-order preservation.

command.description: Path to the pdf-to-markdown CLI binary. Defaults to the bundled binary in node_modules/.bin, then PATH.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for the Nutrient CLI per document. Default: 30000.

command.label: Nutrient CLI Path
command.help: Path to the pdf-to-markdown binary. Leave empty to auto-resolve from the bundled dependency or PATH.

timeoutMs.label: Extraction Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Maximum time for Nutrient to process a single PDF.
